title: Tunisian Oyster Dolsot
description: A spicy Tunisian-inspired dish cooked in a dolsot, a traditional Korean stone pot. This recipe features succulent oysters as the main ingredient.
instructions: Preheat the dolsot over high heat for 5 minutes.
Add 1 tsp of olive oil to the dolsot and swirl to coat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the shucked oysters to the dolsot and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to release their juices.
Add the spicy Tunisian harissa, lemon juice, salt, and black pepper to the dolsot. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the oysters are cooked through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
